hero.description: Helping adolescents access mental health support, connect with peer mentors, and find guidance without stigma. You are not alone.

dashboard.subtitle_youth: This is your private dashboard. No judgment. No pressure. Explore at your own pace.
dashboard.subtitle_support: Thank you for supporting our community as a registered {{role}}! Explore your tools below.
dashboard.peer_comparison: "You are doing better than 85% of peers in resilience!"

assessments.title: Assessments
assessments.desc: Quick, stress-free questionnaires to help track your mood and identify feelings early on.

games.title: Mini-Games & Exercises
games.desc: Interactive breathing exercises, visual grounding games, and anxiety-relief activities.

community.title: Anonymous Community
community.desc: Share your struggles privately. Support others or get advice anonymously. Zero personal info required.

mentorship.title: Peer Mentorship
mentorship.desc: Connect with trained mentors and professional therapists to discuss specific challenges safely.

chatbot.title: Svasthya AI Companion
chatbot.desc: Talk to our free, intelligent chatbot 24/7 for coping tips, grounding exercises, and mental health suggestions.
chatbot.greeting: Hi there! I am your Svasthya Companion. I can provide grounding exercises, stress-relief tips, or just be here to chat. How are you feeling right now?

home.how_it_works_subtitle: A seamless journey to better mental health and supportive community.
home.impact_title: Creating a Support Ecosystem for Youth
home.impact_desc: This platform is designed not just as an app, but as an ecosystem that connects youth, mentors, and organizations. By combining digital wellbeing tools, community support networks, and data insights, the platform helps create safer environments where young people can seek help early and build resilience.
home.cta_title: Together We Can Build Safer Spaces for Youth
home.cta_subtitle: Join us in transforming how young people access mental health support.

footer.tagline: A digitally safe sanctuary for adolescent mental wellbeing, connecting youth to the resilience they need.
footer.copyright: Svasthya Digital Wellbeing Platform. All rights reserved.

auth.login_subtitle: Log in to continue your journey.
auth.signup_subtitle: Join our community for a safer wellbeing journey.

milestones.title: Your Wellness Journey
milestones.subtitle: Complete milestones to unlock your mental health analysis.
